title: Nagindas Khandwala Merit List 2026

detail.title: Nagindas Khandwala Merit List 2026
detail.short_info: Nagindas Khandwala Merit List 2026 First List has been released on 26 May 2026. Check important dates, document verification schedule and download merit list for all UG courses at nkc.ac.in.

content.text: Nagindas Khandwala Merit List 2026 (First Merit List) has been released on 26 May 2026. Candidates can now check and download the merit list for various undergraduate courses on the official website nkc.ac.in. Nagindas Khandwala College (NKC College), Malad West, Mumbai, has published the First Merit List for First Year UG admissions for the academic year 2026-27. The college is affiliated with the University of Mumbai and offers multiple aided and self-financed courses.

sections.heading: Important Dates for Nagindas Khandwala Merit List 2026

content.text: Here are the direct links to download the First Merit List 2026:

content.text: Place Direct Merit List Link Here for best user experience.

sections.heading: How to Check Nagindas Khandwala Merit List 2026

items: Click on the Merit List tab.
Download the PDF and search for your name using Ctrl + F.

content.text: Place Official Merit List Link Here: Available on nkc.ac.in
